subject: One more ‘big reveal’ (for affiliates only)
body:
Mozination -

With 2 days left to the launch, as of right now you only need:

- 2,155 referrals / signups to get in the top 10.

- 353 referrals / signups to get in the top 50.

See Full Leaderboard Here

And you only need 10… to get the 3 prizes (chance to a win a day at our HQ*, Book Launch recording, and the 70 Profit Tactics Audiobook).

Good news: I'm giving away a lot of stuff on Saturday. And one, is extremely valuable.

Bad news: I only have limited amounts (because they're physical).

Good news: If you're on live, you will probably be able to get one. And if you email your audience immediately after - they will too.

Action item: I'd let your audience know that there's gonna be something at the very end & that you'll be emailing the links to them the moment the event is over. So they can have exclusive access.

In fact - I'm going to send you an email right before my presentation is over so you can get a jump on it for your audience.

Alex.

PS - This is ON TOP OF my multi-year secret project. I know. Lots of goodies. But…only for people who show up because I will a) run out b) only give them to people there live with me.

PPS - I noticed a couple of people stuck below 10 referrals to get the prizes.

I know for some 10 referrals might sound like a lot.

But you can do it.

Last week, I saw someone get 16 referrals in an afternoon by posting his link in a company Slack Channel.

Others have texted 10 friends - said it took 5 min.

Here are some of the simple ways people are unlocking it:

- Posting a story on IG
- Creating a YouTube video around the 100M live event with their link in the description.
- Posting on LinkedIn (with a reason why someone should sign up)
- Posting in communities / groups to see who's interested

With a single post in your company Slack Channel, a share on LinkedIn, or a tweet about how excited you are, you could unlock the 3 bonuses (recording, chance to come out onsite, audiobook) in an afternoon.

Try it out today.

Tomorrow you can see how well it's done when you get your total enrollments email. (You need to refer one person to unlock it.)
